case_title: THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES VS. A&R CASEWORK AND CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: NTC OF HRG ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; INDEX FILED BY PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR APR-30-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE FUND FOR CALIFORNIA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR. PETITIONER DID NOT TIMELY FILE PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE "AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARDS." (CAL. RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1300(C).) ON MARCH 21, 2014, PETITIONERS FILED AN "AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARDS" TO CONFIRM TWO ARBITRATION AWARDS FOR: (1) GRIEVANCE 13-031 CONDUCTED ON OCTOBER 8, 2013 (AM. PETITION, 8); AND (2) GRIEVANCE 13-044 CONDUCTED ON NOVEMBER 12, 2013 (ID. AT 9). (AM. PETITION, P. 4:10-1. SEE ID. AT EXHIBITS B, C.) PETITIONER HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT THIS AMENDED PETITION WAS SERVED ON RESPONDENT. ON MARCH 26, 2014, PETITIONER FILED PROOF OF SERVICE, DATED MARCH 17, 2014, DEMONSTRATING SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON MARCH 16, 2014 OF FILINGS RELATED TO THE "PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD," BUT NOT THE "AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARDS." NO OTHER PROOF OF SERVICE HAS BEEN FILED DEMONSTRATING SERVICE OF THE "AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARDS." JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EZEKIEL D. CARDER OF WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. (510) 337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE ON THE RECORD. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER, THE COURT CORRECTED THE TOTAL AMOUNT DUE ON THE AWARD. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted, no opposition filed. The Court will award reasonable attorney fees of $1,100 and costs of $912.67. The total amount due and owing is thus $17,278.08. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Index
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, in their capacities as Trustees of the Carpenters Health and Welfare Fund for California's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is off calendar. Petitioner did not timely file proof of service for the "Amended Petition to Confirm Arbitration Awards." (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1300(c).) On March 21, 2014, Petitioners filed an "Amended Petition to Confirm Arbitration Awards" to confirm two arbitration awards for: (1) Grievance 13-031 conducted on October 8, 2013 (Am. Petition, 8); and (2) Grievance 13-044 conducted on November 12, 2013 (Id. at 9). (Am. Petition, p. 4:10-1. See id. at Exhibits B, C.) Petitioner has not demonstrated that this Amended Petition was served on Respondent. On March 26, 2014, Petitioner filed proof of service, dated March 17, 2014, demonstrating substitute service on March 16, 2014 of filings related to the "Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award," but not the "Amended Petition to Confirm Arbitration Awards." No other proof of service has been filed demonstrating service of the "Amended Petition to Confirm Arbitration Awards." Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
